agents.name: Director Agent
agents.description: Plans storyboards and orchestrates the animation workflow

agents.name: Writer Agent
agents.description: Expands scripts, dialogue, and emotion tags

agents.name: Live2D Modeling Agent
agents.description: Generates or selects Live2D model artifacts from text or image input

agents.name: Animation Agent
agents.description: Generates shot motion, expression parameters, and animation artifacts

agents.name: Voice Agent
agents.description: Generates dialogue audio and speech timing artifacts

agents.name: LipSync Agent
agents.description: Aligns speech, phonemes, visemes, and mouth-shape timing

agents.name: Renderer Agent
agents.description: Composes shot artifacts into the final video output
